rss.channel:
朝九晚五 https://9to5mac.com/ Apple 新闻和 Mac 谣言全天爆发2026 年 3 月 30 日星期一 22:30:03 +0000 en-US每小时1 https://wordpress.org/?v=6.9.4 https://9to5mac.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/6/2019/10/cropped-cropped-mac1-1.png?w=32朝九晚五https://9to5mac.com/ 32 32 146091842 苹果加大对vibe编码应用的打击力度，从App Store下架“Anything” https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-steps-up-crackdown-on-vibe-coding-apps-pulls-anything-from-the-app-store/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-steps-up-crackdown-on-vibe-coding-apps-pulls-anything-from-the-app-store/#respondMarcus Mendes Mon, 30 Mar 2026 22:30:01 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045859

据The Information报道，苹果公司上周从 App Store 下架了 Vibe 编码应用程序“ Anything ”，理由是其应用程序审查指南中的自我遏制规则。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-steps-up-crackdown-on-vibe-coding-apps-pulls-anything-from-the-app-store/feed/ 0 1045859 苹果在欧盟测试第三方配件的自动音频切换https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-testing-automatic-audio-switching-for-third-party-accessories-in-the-eu/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-testing-automatic-audio-switching-for-third-party-accessories-in-the-eu/#respondMarcus Mendes Mon, 30 Mar 2026 21:53:50 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045834

随着苹果不断做出改变以遵守欧盟的数字市场法案，苹果正在测​​试一个新框架，该框架可为第三方音频配件带来自动音频切换功能。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-testing-automatic-audio-switching-for-third-party-accessories-in-the-eu/feed/ 0 1045834 iOS 26.5 增加了对欧盟第三方配件的实时活动支持https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-adds-live-activities-support-for-third-party-accessories-in-the-eu/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-adds-live-activities-support-for-third-party-accessories-in-the-eu/#respondMarcus Mendes Mon, 30 Mar 2026 20:41:24 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045821

根据 9to5Mac 看到的新代码，苹果正在努力在欧洲的 iOS 26.5 中支持第三方配件中的实时活动。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-adds-live-activities-support-for-third-party-accessories-in-the-eu/feed/ 0 1045821 iOS 26.5 的消息应用程序在测试版中具有 RCS 端到端加密https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5s-messages-app-has-rcs-end-to-end-encryption-in-beta/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5s-messages-app-has-rcs-end-to-end-encryption-in-beta/#commentsRyan Christoffel Mon, 30 Mar 2026 20:31:28 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045814

iOS 26.5 beta 1现已向开发者开放，其中包含 新的苹果地图功能，暗示有 新的应用内订阅选项，但没有 Siri 升级的迹象。 iOS 26.5 还为 Messages 提供了对端到端加密 RCS 消息传递的支持。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5s-messages-app-has-rcs-end-to-end-encryption-in-beta/feed/ 7 1045814 Apple 推出 macOS Sonoma 14.8.6 和 macOS Sequoia 15.7.6 候选版本https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-rolls-out-macos-sonoma-14-8-6-and-macos-sequoia-15-7-6-release-candidates/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-rolls-out-macos-sonoma-14-8-6-and-macos-sequoia-15-7-6-release-candidates/#respondMarcus Mendes Mon, 30 Mar 2026 19:54:31 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045816

在发布macOS Sonoma 14.8.5 和 macOS Sequoia 15.7.5 不到一周后，Apple 现已为下一次更新确定了候选版本。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-rolls-out-macos-sonoma-14-8-6-and-macos-sequoia-15-7-6-release-candidates/feed/ 0 1045816 随着焦点转向 iOS 27，iOS 26.5 Beta 版没有 Gemini 支持的 AI 功能https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-beta-arrives-with-no-gemini-powered-ai-features-as-focus-shifts-to-ios-27/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-beta-arrives-with-no-gemini-powered-ai-features-as-focus-shifts-to-ios-27/#commentsZac Hall Mon, 30 Mar 2026 19:49:06 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045799

可以肯定地说，由 Gemini 驱动的 Siri 和 Apple Intelligence 功能不会在本月推出测试版。 iOS 26.5 beta 1 如期发布。不过，升级后的AI功能并不包含在内。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-beta-arrives-with-no-gemini-powered-ai-features-as-focus-shifts-to-ios-27/feed/ 11 1045799 iOS 26.5 可能会添加新的应用内订阅选项https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-might-add-new-in-app-options-for-subscriptions/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-might-add-new-in-app-options-for-subscriptions/#commentsRyan Christoffel Mon, 30 Mar 2026 19:40:43 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045801

iOS 26.5 beta 1今天发布供开发者测试，苹果的发行说明表明该更新将为应用内订阅提供新的 App Store 选项。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-might-add-new-in-app-options-for-subscriptions/feed/ 2 1045801 iOS 26.5 为热门地点添加了新的 Apple 地图功能https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-adds-new-apple-maps-feature-for-trending-places/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-adds-new-apple-maps-feature-for-trending-places/#commentsRyan Christoffel Mon, 30 Mar 2026 19:01:07 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045794

iOS 26.5 beta 1今天发布，并带来了一项新的 Apple 地图功能，用于发现下一步要去哪里，简称为“建议地点”。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-adds-new-apple-maps-feature-for-trending-places/feed/ 2 1045794 元测试付费 Instagram 服务，让用户秘密查看故事https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/meta-testing-paid-instagram-service-that-lets-users-secretly-view-stories/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/meta-testing-paid-instagram-service-that-lets-users-secretly-view-stories/#commentsZac Hall Mon, 30 Mar 2026 18:58:00 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045795

Meta 一月份透露，计划测试 Instagram、WhatsApp 和 Facebook 的付费版本。现在，在选定的市场中，第一个优质服务已经推出。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/meta-testing-paid-instagram-service-that-lets-users-secretly-view-stories/feed/ 4 1045795 据用户报告，Apple Intelligence 现已在中国推出 [U：已撤​​回] https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-intelligence-rolling-out-now-in-china-per-user-reports/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-intelligence-rolling-out-now-in-china-per-user-reports/#commentsRyan Christoffel Mon, 30 Mar 2026 18:12:51 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045778

Apple Intelligence 于 2024 年 10 月首次在美国推出，但现在经过近 18 个月的等待，苹果的 AI 功能似乎也在中国推出。

更新：根据 Mark Gurman 的说法，Apple Intelligence 在中国的发布是一个错误，此后已被撤回。尽管这些功能已经准备好几个月了，但苹果显然仍在等待监管部门的批准。原故事如下...

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-intelligence-rolling-out-now-in-china-per-user-reports/feed/ 1 1045778 iPadOS 26.5 beta 1 现已推出，还有 tvOS 26.5、watchOS 26.5 等https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ipados-26-5-beta-1-now-available-plus-tvos-26-5-watchos-26-5-more/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ipados-26-5-beta-1-now-available-plus-tvos-26-5-watchos-26-5-more/#commentsRyan Christoffel Mon, 30 Mar 2026 17:44:43 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045109

Apple 今天启动了新一波 Beta 软件更新，发布了 iPadOS 26.5、tvOS 26.5、watchOS 26.5 等的开发者 Beta 1。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ipados-26-5-beta-1-now-available-plus-tvos-26-5-watchos-26-5-more/feed/ 2 1045109
